spec_match.rationale: Music player popout still uses copyStyleSheets and now registers navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler for play, pause, nexttrack, and previoustrack.

interactive.rationale: Host buttons, simulated media-key buttons, and cloned PiP buttons all update the same track/playback state and log the action source.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises music-player now-playing with design-system carrying — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: MediaSession support and fallback status are visible, metadata/playbackState are updated, and all four requested action handlers are registered when supported.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, design system tokens carry through.

summary: MCP Chrome 148.0.0.0 on macOS loaded http://localhost:3000/v131/document-picture-in-picture-copy-document-mode/lock-screen-controls/, verified MediaSession handlers registered as play, pause, nexttrack, and previoustrack, clicked host next/play, simulated previous/pause/next media keys, opened PiP, then clicked PiP next/play. Track, artist, play button, MediaSession metadata, playbackState, and log/readout updated from each control path. Console was clean, network requests were 200/204, and the feature conformance route reported 5/5 pass.
